Uses of Class
com.societegenerale.failover.properties.FailoverProperties

Package
Description
com.societegenerale.failover.configuration
Spring Boot auto-configuration for the failover framework.

  • Uses of FailoverProperties in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration

    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration with parameters of type FailoverProperties
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FailoverStore<Object>
    FailoverStoreAutoConfiguration.asyncMultiTenantFailoverStore(TenantResolver tenantResolver, TenantStoreFactory<Object> rawFactory, FailoverProperties props, org.springframework.core.task.TaskExecutor failoverTaskExecutor, CompositeObservablePublisher observablePublisher)
    Async multi-tenant store: MultiTenantFailoverStore with per-tenant FailoverStoreAsync(DefaultFailoverStore(raw)) decorator.
    FailoverHandler<Object>
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.failoverHandler(KeyGenerator keyGenerator, ExpiryPolicy<Object> expiryPolicy, FailoverClock clock, FailoverStore<Object> failoverStore, PayloadEnricher<Object> payloadEnricher, RecoveredPayloadHandler recoveredPayloadHandler, CompositeObservablePublisher observablePublisher, FailoverExpiryExtractor failoverExpiryExtractor, PayloadSplitterLookup<Object,Object> payloadSplitterLookup, ContextPropagator contextPropagator, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<org.springframework.core.task.TaskExecutor> scatterGatherExecutorProvider, FailoverProperties failoverProperties)
    Assembles the full FailoverHandler decorator chain: AdvancedFailoverHandler(ScatterGatherFailoverHandler(DefaultFailoverHandler)).
    FailoverObserver
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.failoverObserver(CompositeObservablePublisher observablePublisher, FailoverScanner failoverScanner, FailoverClock clock, ManifestInfoExtractor manifestInfoExtractor, FailoverExpiryExtractor failoverExpiryExtractor, FailoverProperties failoverProperties)
    Creates the failover reporter bean that publishes a startup summary.
    TenantStoreFactory<Object>
    FailoverStoreMultiTenantAutoConfiguration.jdbcMultiTenantStoreFactory(FailoverProperties props, org.springframework.jdbc.core.JdbcTemplate jdbcTemplate, Serializer serializer, DatabaseResolver databaseResolver, PayloadColumnResolver payloadColumnResolver, org.springframework.jdbc.core.RowMapper<ReferentialPayload<Object>> rowMapper)
    Auto-configured JDBC TenantStoreFactory for the TABLE_PREFIX strategy.
    FailoverStore<Object>
    FailoverStoreAutoConfiguration.syncMultiTenantFailoverStore(TenantResolver tenantResolver, TenantStoreFactory<Object> rawFactory, FailoverProperties props)
    Sync multi-tenant store: MultiTenantFailoverStore with per-tenant DefaultFailoverStore(raw) decorator.
